subject: [PATCH v6 06/22] mm: swap: add a separate type for physical swap slots

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new type, swp_slot_t, to represent physical swap slots on swap devices. It separates the logical view of swap entries from their physical backing state, allowing for future virtualization of swap. The mapping between the two types is an identity mapping, and the only intentional behavioral change is in swap_vma_readahead(), which now pins readahead entries via tryget_swap_entry()/put_swap_entry(). This patch is a mechanical refactor to prepare for dynamic allocation of virtual swap slots and association with backing stores.
